title: Zero struct-layout static asserts for N64-layout ROM structs (StandTile, PROPDEF records); protection is compiler flags only

history.note: struct_layout ctest PASS (macOS clang) + MinGW cross-compile PASS; 45 _Static_asserts (34 sizeof + 11 offsetof) lock the -mno-ms-bitfields N64 layout; negative control confirms non-vacuous. Closes FID-0035; first half of FID-0036 (converter risk-case union/pair-stride offsets locked).
